title: Produce the executable M1 simulation-kernel plan
summary: Decompose M1 into reviewed tasks for map grids, spatial indexes, path request batching, jobs, reservations and the first hauling scenario with performance budgets.
acceptance: Plan contains a dependency DAG of tasks small enough for independent worktrees
Every task has observable acceptance, tests, benchmark impact and docs
First vertical scenario is hauling/building rather than broad content production
No task depends on an unresolved hidden architecture decision
